source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An air pistol contains compressed air in a small cylinder. Assume that the volume is 1 cm^3, the pressure is 1 MPa, and the temperature is 27\circ\text{C} when armed. A bullet, with m = 15 g, acts as a piston initially held by a pin (trigger); when released, the air expands in an isothermal process (T= constant). If the air pressure is 0.1 MPa in the cylinder as the bullet leaves the gun Determine the bullet exit velocity.
